title: rubus hirtus var. coloratiformis
intro: Rubus hirtus var. coloratiformis, also known as Himalayan raspberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Himalayan raspberry can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its potential therapeutic uses.
